# init(token:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a token session with the specified token.

## Declaration

```swift
init(token: TKToken)
```

## Parameters

- **token**: The token to which the initialized session is bound.

## Return Value

A new token session created with the specified token.

## Discussion

This is the designated initializer.
title: init(token:)
